description: A complex network of steam pipes and assembly lines producing... pasta? The air is warm and smells faintly of garlic.

exit_west.description: A dark crawlspace leading back to the Hidden Hideout.

steel_wall.description: Thick steel-plated walls that vibrate with heavy machinery.

metal_floor.description: Polished metal floor plates, slightly slippery from condensation.

noodle_vats.description: Giant boiling vats of starchy broth and noodles.

item.name: Spicy Noodles
item.description: Exotic and very spicy noodles from the factory. Hot enough to melt ice!
item.opened_description: The vats are boiling, but no more spicy noodles can be safely scooped.

onUse.successMessage: You collected some Spicy Noodles! The fiery aroma makes your eyes water!

chef_tortellini.description: A chef wearing a white hat, frantically stirring a pot.

dialogue.text: "The recipe must be exact! No mistakes! Starch is the secret to all life!" Chef Tortellini shouts frantically.

assembly_belt.description: A mechanical conveyor belt transporting uncooked pasta shapes.

jammed_valve.description: A large steam valve that has rusted shut. It refuses to turn.

tube_portal.description: A giant pneumatic transport tube. It seems to lead to a different part of the facility.
